title: read-package-json — output
description: Typed extract of the load-bearing fields from a package.json file. Per the Blue invariant we describe only the fields the discover-project Workflow actually consumes (name, version, private, scripts_keys for the Infer Step's prompt context).

name.description: The package.json `name` field; null if absent or the manifest file does not exist.

version.description: The package.json `version` field (typically semver); null if absent.

private.description: The package.json `private` field; null if absent. Drives the deploy_target inference.

scripts_keys.description: Sorted list of the keys under `scripts` (not the values). Empty list if `scripts` is absent.
